mapper.insert: insert into release_issue (release_plan_id, issue_id, task_id, category, notes, added_by, added_at) values (#{releasePlanId}, #{issueId}, #{taskId}, #{category}, #{notes}, #{addedBy}, #{addedAt})
mapper.update: update release_issue set deleted = 1 where release_issue_id = #{releaseIssueId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from release_issue where release_plan_id = #{releasePlanId} and deleted = 0
